description_long: This obelisk is a tall, tapering monument constructed from stacked, roughly hewn stone blocks, each with a slightly irregular, weathered surface. The central shaft is adorned on two sides with glowing, turquoise geometric and spiral motifs, suggesting a mystical or ceremonial significance. The base is broad and multi-layered, composed of interlocking stone cubes in varying shades of gray, providing a sturdy foundation. Gold trim accents the transitions between the shaft and the base, as well as the topmost section, adding a sense of grandeur and importance. The tip is flat and capped with a gold band, lacking any pointed or pyramidal feature. The overall appearance is both ancient and slightly fantastical, making it a striking landmark in an urban park or plaza.
description: A tall, stone obelisk with glowing turquoise motifs, gold trim, and a broad, blocky base. Its weathered surface and decorative accents give it an ancient, mystical appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing glowing turquoise motifs on the shaft and the layered, blocky stone base.
description_view_1: Side view with plain stone blocks and gold trim, no glowing motifs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with additional glowing turquoise motifs and a clear view of the base's structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, plain stone blocks with gold trim, no motifs visible.
attribute_ornamentation: Glowing turquoise geometric and spiral motifs on two sides of the shaft; gold trim bands at the base and tip.
attribute_base_design: The base is a broad, multi-layered platform made of interlocking, roughly hewn stone cubes in various shades of gray, forming a sturdy and visually complex foundation.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and capped with a gold band, lacking any pointed or pyramidal feature, and is simple in design.
